home.heroTitle: Share files across all your devices in seconds
home.heroSubtitle: MediaShare helps you move photos, videos, and documents between iOS, Android, and desktop with a secure and simple workflow.
home.screenshotSubtitle: A clean and consistent sharing experience across platforms.
home.downloadSubtitle: Install MediaShare and start sharing instantly.

screenshots.caption: Fast device discovery and transfer entry
Clear transfer history and status details

features.title: High-Speed Transfer
features.desc: Share large files quickly over local network with reliable progress tracking.

features.title: Cross-Platform
features.desc: Connect iOS, Android, and desktop clients in one workflow.

features.title: Secure by Design
features.desc: Your transfers are protected with modern transport and session controls.

features.title: Simple Operation
features.desc: Clean screens and guided actions keep every transfer easy to complete.

features.title: Transfer History
features.desc: Review what was sent, received, and when for better traceability.

features.title: Helpful Support
features.desc: Use in-app guidance and support channels to resolve issues quickly.

sections.title: Scope
sections.content: This policy explains how MediaShare collects, uses, and protects information when you use the app and website.

sections.title: Data We Collect
sections.content: We may process account identifiers, diagnostic logs, and transfer metadata that are necessary to provide and improve the service.

sections.title: How We Use Data
sections.content: Data is used for service operation, security monitoring, troubleshooting, and product quality improvements.

sections.title: Sharing and Disclosure
sections.content: We do not sell your personal data. Data is shared only with service providers or when required by law.

sections.title: Storage and Security
sections.content: We apply reasonable technical and organizational safeguards to reduce unauthorized access, loss, or misuse risks.

sections.title: Your Rights
sections.content: You can contact us to request access, correction, deletion, or other rights as allowed by applicable laws.

sections.title: Children
sections.content: MediaShare is not directed to children under the legal minimum age in your jurisdiction.

sections.title: Policy Updates
sections.content: We may update this policy over time. Material changes will be published on this page.

sections.title: Acceptance
sections.content: By using MediaShare, you agree to this user policy and related legal documents.

sections.title: Account and Access
sections.content: You are responsible for lawful use of your account, device, and connected network environments.

sections.title: User Content
sections.content: You are responsible for files and data you transfer and must ensure you have required rights and permissions.

sections.title: Prohibited Conduct
sections.content: You must not use MediaShare for illegal, harmful, abusive, or security-compromising activities.

sections.title: Service Changes
sections.content: We may modify, suspend, or discontinue parts of the service with reasonable notice when possible.

sections.title: Disclaimer
sections.content: The service is provided as available. We do not guarantee uninterrupted operation in all network conditions.

sections.title: Limitation of Liability
sections.content: To the extent permitted by law, we are not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages.

sections.title: Dispute Resolution
sections.content: Disputes are handled according to applicable laws and agreed jurisdiction terms.

support.title: Technical Support
support.intro: We provide fast support for installation, transfer failures, and compatibility issues.
support.contactDesc: Send your issue details and screenshots to help us diagnose problems quickly.

faq.q: Why can’t my devices discover each other?
faq.a: Ensure both devices are on the same network, grant local network permissions, and disable restrictive firewall settings.
Check available storage, network stability, and whether the app stays active in foreground during transfer.

faq.q: How do I report a bug effectively?
faq.a: Include app version, device model, OS version, reproduction steps, and screenshots in your support email.

footer.description: MediaShare makes cross-device file sharing simple and reliable.
